title: Due Diligence Deep Dive
subtitle: The 90-day checklist that keeps you out of bad deals
description: Due diligence is where deals die — or where they should. You'll walk through the complete DD checklist: legal (title, survey, zoning, liens), physical (PCA, roof, HVAC, structural), environmental (Phase I/II ESA), financial (lease audit, CAM reconciliation), and tenant credit DD. Includes MaxLife's full downloadable checklist.
outcomes: Run a complete DD process from LOI signature to closing
Order and interpret a Phase I environmental site assessment
Audit a rent roll against actual leases and tenant payments
Spot title exceptions, easements, and zoning issues that kill deals
Use findings to renegotiate price or walk with earnest money refunded
keywords: commercial real estate due diligence checklist
